original: The Reaper Armaments Gigantomachia Exoskeleton is the latest marvel in terms of combat armor. This cumbersome piece of dark green and purple plates is designed to protect the wearer against beam blasts and explosive shells alike. An internal layer of shock-absorbing foam, paired with multiple coats of ablative plates form a sturdy carapace that even tank treads wouldn’t be able to crush.\n\nThis particular design lacks integrated heavy weapons, but circumvents this inconvenience with a flurry of fancy gadgets, making it a wonderful tool for [silly|your adventures in tainted spaces - on top of giving you a killer ass|any stellar explorer].
